text: NASA's Apollo 11 mission landed the first humans on the Moon in July 1969.
The World Health Organization declared COVID-19 a pandemic in March 2020.
Egypt and Ethiopia have been in long-running talks over the Grand Ethiopian Renaissance Dam on the Nile.
The 2022 FIFA World Cup was held in Qatar.
The Suez Canal was blocked for six days in March 2021 after a container ship ran aground.
Saudi Arabia and Egypt signed several economic cooperation agreements during a Gulf-Arab summit in 2023.

تم دفن المرشد الأعلى الإيراني الراحل آية الله علي خامنئي في مدينة مشهد بعد مراسم تشييع استمرت عدة أيام.

بصراحة، كأس العالم هذا الموسم كان الأجمل من ناحية المفاجآت رغم كل الانتقادات.
